expectations.text: Uses confluence.mjs search (not jira.mjs) as primary search
expectations.evidence: Section 3 shows confluence.mjs search as the primary command. Section 2 explicitly states 'Confluence relevance: HIGH' and 'prioritize and lead with Confluence results'. While a supplementary Jira search is mentioned, it is clearly secondary.

expectations.text: CQL includes terms like deployment, runbook, or deploy
expectations.evidence: Primary CQL: 'text ~ "deployment runbook"'. Broadened CQL includes 'deploy to production' and 'release runbook'. Label search uses 'label = "runbook" AND text ~ "deployment"'.

expectations.text: Plans to fetch full page content with confluence.mjs get-page
expectations.evidence: Section 4 states: 'fetch each page's full content using get-page' with exact command 'confluence.mjs get-page <pageId>' and an example with page ID 78901.

expectations.text: Presents results with page title and source citation
expectations.evidence: Section 5 describes citing sources with 'page title, Confluence space key, and a direct URL' and shows an example citation format.
